# Design Pattern Visualizer

## About
An educational web app that visualizes software design patterns with step-by-step animations and code highlighting.  
Focus patterns: Singleton and Strategy (MVP), with planned coverage across Creational, Structural, and Behavioral patterns.

## Audience
Students, junior developers, and educators learning object-oriented design patterns.

## Content Types
- Pattern visualizations (animated)
- Explanations (when to use)
- Pros/cons summaries
- Java-like example code (mocked in TypeScript)

## Primary Topics
- Design Patterns
- Singleton Pattern
- Strategy Pattern
- OOP Principles
- Architecture Visualization

## Key URLs
- Home: /
- Creational Patterns: /creational
- Structural Patterns: /structural
- Behavioral Patterns: /behavioral
- Patterns Index: See category pages above; full list is available via /sitemap.xml
- Example Patterns:
	- /creational/singleton
	- /behavioral/strategy

## Tech Stack
Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Zustand

## Contact
For inquiries, use the contact link on the site (if available).
